Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raquel Fox, Esq.(415-771-9850 x115) for Plaintiff/ Moving party Gail Izaguirre.
John Cigavic, III Esq. (415-859-5065) specially appearing for for Defendant/opposingMoving party RENKA PROP, LLC.
Court reporter: Sarah J. Seitz, CSR #14175, 415-834-1114, Reported. (501).

The Court announces the tentative ruling on the discovery motions and sanctions imposed. Both sides ARGUED.Defendant argues defendant has responded and answered, questions were vague and compound, interrogatories too many and outrageous. Plaintiff argues answers were boiler plate. Plaintiff requests special interrogatories be completed by 4/12/17 and a compliance date of 4/14/17. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with modifications as follows:

PLAINTIFF GAIL IZAGUIRRE Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections. Date of compliance is 4/12/17. Sanctions granted in the amount of $10,400. Sanctions to be paid by 4/14/17. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sarah J. Seitz, CSR #14175, 415-834-1114, Reported. (501).

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance And Production Of Documents At Deposition; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raquel Fox, Esq.(415-771-9850 x115) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Gail Izaguirre.
John Cigavic, III Esq. (415-859-5065) specially appearing for for Defendant/Moving party RENKA PROP, LLC.
Court reporter: Sarah J. Seitz, CSR #14175, 415-834-1114, Reported. (501).

Hearing is held. The Court announces Julie Nong was ordered to be present. The motion to withdraw is opposed; after reading the Opposition, the Court has concluded possible credibility problems. ARGUED. Plaintiff reports no compliance with the Tentative ruling rule. Defendant Argues Ms. Nong was withdrawing her motion to withdraw and the relationship with the client has broken down. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RENKA PROP, LLC's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil is Denied without Prejudice. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sarah J. Seitz, CSR #14175, 415-834-1114, Reported. (501).
